data.title: Write RED test asserting README.md structural contract (plain-language description + INSTALL.md link)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Purpose
Write a RED test asserting the structural contract for the rewritten root README.md — plain-language description and link to INSTALL.md.

## File Impact
- tests/test-readme-structure.sh — CREATE
- .test-index — EDIT (add RED marker)

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/test-readme-structure.sh (executable).
2. Assertions (each exits 1 on failure):
   - README.md exists at repo root
   - README.md size > 500 bytes (not a near-empty placeholder)
   - README.md contains a reference to INSTALL.md via markdown link `[INSTALL.md](INSTALL.md)` or similar relative link
   - README.md contains at least 3 paragraphs of prose (separate by blank lines, each >= 40 chars of non-code text)
   - README.md mentions "Digital Service Orchestra" at least once
   - README.md mentions the word "plugin" or "Claude Code" or "workflow"
   - README.md does NOT contain raw code-only content (i.e., the first 300 bytes are not a fenced code block)
3. Verify the script exits non-zero now (current README is near-placeholder).
4. Add `[test_readme_structure]` RED marker to .test-index for README.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] tests/test-readme-structure.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/test-readme-structure.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) on current placeholder README.md
  Verify: ! bash tests/test-readme-structure.sh
- [ ] RED marker present for README.md
  Verify: grep -F '[test_readme_structure]' .test-index
